low_risk.label: Low risk
low_risk.guidance: No immediate action required. Continue routine care.

refer.label: Refer for assessment
refer.guidance: Schedule a follow-up assessment with a clinician.

urgent.label: Urgent referral recommended
urgent.guidance: Seek immediate medical care. Refer without delay.

chw_steps.power_on: Press and hold the power button for 3 seconds. Wait for the green light.
chw_steps.acquire: Attach the electrodes as shown, ask the patient to stay still, and start the recording.
chw_steps.interpret: Read the colour tier shown on screen: green, amber, or red.
chw_steps.refer_when: Refer any amber or red result following your site referral protocol.
chw_steps.sync_verify: Check that the sync icon shows a recent successful upload before ending your shift.

guide.power_note: A stable power source or a battery/UPS that covers daily clinic hours.
guide.connectivity_note: Intermittent connectivity is acceptable; results sync when a connection is available.
guide.hardware_note: Raspberry Pi 4 (4 GB), a compatible ECG capture device, and an SD card of 32 GB or more.

troubleshooting.power_loss: After a power loss the device restarts automatically; stored results are preserved and re-sync when power returns.
troubleshooting.sd_corruption: If the device fails to boot, re-flash the SD card using the preparation script and restore from the last backup.
troubleshooting.serial_timeout: If ECG capture times out, check the cable, re-seat the connector, and retry the recording.
